title: SBGN Pathway Visualizer & the OSDR Plant Spaceflight Pathway Atlas
description:
A standalone, browser-based tool to overlay RNA-seq and other omics data onto SBGN (Reactome) and KEGG (KGML) pathway maps — deterministic rendering, no API key or AI service. Includes an import path for NASA OSDR/GeneLab differential-expression data.

Bundled with it is the OSDR Plant Spaceflight Pathway Atlas: a reproducible pipeline and Jupyter Book that projects 27 Arabidopsis thaliana spaceflight RNA-seq studies onto KEGG pathways, annotates every gene with its UniProt subcellular compartment, and reports the conserved, hormone- and cell-wall-centred pathway response and the cell-surface concentration of the response. Ships static ggkegg panel figures, cross-study heatmaps, a pathway→compartment Sankey, and a Gene–Pathway–Compartment–Study knowledge graph (GraphML + Neo4j).
